group.description: OSGi validation constraints: detects unresolved Require-Bundle and Fragment-Host references, circular bundle dependencies, missing Bundle-Version headers, and unsatisfied Import-Package entries.

constraint.description: Finds Require-Bundle entries that cannot be resolved to any bundle in the scanned project. These may indicate missing dependencies.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) WHERE NOT (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, bundle.bundleVersion AS BundleVersion, rb.symbolicName AS UnresolvedRequiredBundle ORDER BY Bundle

constraint.description: Finds fragment bundles whose Fragment-Host cannot be resolved to any bundle in the scanned project.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (fragment:Osgi:Fragment) WHERE NOT (fragment)-[:FRAGMENT_OF]->(:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT fragment.bundleSymbolicName AS Fragment, fragment.bundleVersion AS FragmentVersion, fragment.fragmentHostSymbolicName AS UnresolvedHost ORDER BY Fragment

constraint.description: Detects circular dependencies between bundles via Require-Bundle (A requires B requires A).
constraint.cypher: MATCH (a:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(:Osgi:RequiredBundle)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(b:Osgi:Bundle), (b)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(:Osgi:RequiredBundle)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(a) WHERE id(a) < id(b) RETURN DISTINCT a.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleA, a.bundleVersion AS VersionA, b.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleB, b.bundleVersion AS VersionB ORDER BY BundleA

constraint.description: Finds OSGi bundles that do not declare a Bundle-Version in their manifest. Every bundle should have an explicit version.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE bundle.bundleVersion IS NULL RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleWithoutVersion ORDER BY bundle.bundleSymbolicName

constraint.description: Finds Import-Package entries that are not satisfied by any Export-Package in the scanned project. Optional imports are excluded.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:IMPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage) WHERE NOT (ip)<-[:SATISFIES]-(:Osgi:ExportedPackage) AND ip.optional = false RETURN DISTINCT bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, bundle.bundleVersion AS BundleVersion, ip.fqn AS UnsatisfiedPackageImport, ip.version AS ImportVersion ORDER BY Bundle, UnsatisfiedPackageImport

constraint.description: Finds Import-Package entries where no type in the bundle depends on any type from the imported package. These may indicate unnecessary imports that should be removed from the manifest.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:IMPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage) WHERE ip.fqn =~ '^[a-zA-Z].*' AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (bundle)-[:CONTAINS*1..2]->(t:Type)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(dep:Type) WHERE dep.fqn STARTS WITH ip.fqn + '.' } RETURN DISTINCT bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, bundle.bundleVersion AS BundleVersion, ip.fqn AS UnusedPackageImport, ip.optional AS Optional ORDER BY Bundle, UnusedPackageImport

constraint.description: Finds Require-Bundle entries where no type in the requiring bundle depends on any type contained in the required bundle. These may indicate unnecessary bundle dependencies. Note: runtime-only dependencies (e.g., OSGi Declarative Services, extension points, reflection-based loading) are expected false positives.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(:Osgi:RequiredBundle)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE source <> target AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (source)-[:CONTAINS*1..2]->(t:Type)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(dep:Type)<-[:CONTAINS*1..2]-(target) } RETURN DISTINCT source.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, source.bundleVersion AS BundleVersion, target.bundleSymbolicName AS UnusedRequiredBundle, target.bundleVersion AS RequiredBundleVersion ORDER BY Bundle, UnusedRequiredBundle

constraint.description: Finds Import-Package entries that are already covered by a Require-Bundle dependency (the required bundle exports the imported package). These redundant imports can be removed from the manifest.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:IMPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage) WHERE ip.fqn =~ '^[a-zA-Z].*' MATCH (bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(:Osgi:RequiredBundle)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(required:Osgi:Bundle) -[:EXPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ep:Osgi:ExportedPackage) WHERE ep.fqn = ip.fqn RETURN DISTINCT bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, bundle.bundleVersion AS BundleVersion, ip.fqn AS RedundantImport, required.bundleSymbolicName AS CoveredByBundle ORDER BY Bundle, RedundantImport
